model: CIVIC TYPE R FL5 GT PACKAGE
prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the K20C1 engine (2.0L VTEC Turbo) featuring a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel, and 3-inch stainless steel downpipe with a 200-cell catalytic converter for optimized spool and top-end power, paired with a PRL Motorsports intercooler upgrade (core dimensions: 24.5" x 10.5" x 3.5") and a Hondata KPro V4 ECU reflash targeting 380-400 WHP on E85 with a 22 psi boost ceiling

Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension kit (FL5-specific part number: OH-HON-CIV19-RT) with 24-way adjustable damping, 20mm adjustable ride height, and spherical top mounts, paired with a Whiteline 27mm rear sway bar (part number: BSR75XZ) and polyurethane subframe bushings (Energy Suspension part number: 9.11116G) to eliminate torque steer and improve mid-corner rotation

Hybrid Racing K-series oil pump gear set (part number: HR-01-001) with billet 12-tooth drive gear and 38-tooth driven gear to prevent oil pump cavitation at high RPM, paired with a Setrab 50-row oil cooler (part number: 50-300001) and a Moroso aluminum oil pan (part number: 20910) with a -10AN drain plug for improved lubrication under sustained track use
estetica: Seibon Carbon FL5-specific GT Package widebody conversion kit (part number: HON-CIV-FL5-GT-WB) with OEM-style carbon weave, including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a revised rear bumper cover with integrated diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap on the roof and hood for weight reduction and heat dissipation

Voltex Type 5 rear wing (FL5-specific mounting kit: VOL-FL5-RW) with a 1,700mm span, 300mm chord, and 70mm height, constructed from pre-preg carbon fiber with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees) and integrated Gurney flaps for optimized downforce at high speeds, paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter from 991Porsche (part number: 991-FS-FL5) with a 3-inch overhang and integrated canards

Recaro Sportster CS GT3 carbon-Kevlar bucket seats (part number: R-208-GT3-CFK) with FIA 8862-2009 certification, mounted on custom Bride low-profile seat rails (part number: BR-1000-LP-FL5) to maintain OEM seatbelt compatibility, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip) and a NRG Innovations quick-release hub (part number: NRG-200-SFK)
